data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_ClockIsStopped: The clock is stopped...\pBetter set it and start it!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_HowDoYouLikeYourRoo:
MOM: {PLAYER}, how do you like your
new room?\pGood! Everything's put away neatly!\pThey finished moving everything in
downstairs, too.\pPOKéMON movers are so convenient!\pOh, you should make sure that
everything's all there on your desk.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.UnknownString_8172F31: The bookshelf is lined entirely with\nbooks on POKéMON.\pIt's {PLAYER}'s prized collection.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_Notebook: {PLAYER} flipped open the notebook.\pADVENTURE RULE NO. 1\nOpen the MENU with START.\pADVENTURE RULE NO. 2\nRecord your progress with SAVE.\pThe remaining pages are blank...
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.Common_Text_LookCloserAtMap: {PLAYER} took a closer look at the\nHOENN region map.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_ItsAGameCube: It's a Nintendo GameCube.\pA Game Boy Advance is connected to\nserve as the Controller.
